issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, such as installation failures or missing configuration files.
The installation steps assume the presence of npm or Homebrew, which may not be available on all platforms.
Only a single YAML configuration example is provided, lacking multiple realistic demonstrations.

scenarios.name: parallel-pre-commit-lint
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses parallel: true with glob and {staged_files} placeholder per skill; baseline writes sequential hooks and re-lints all files instead of just staged.

scenarios.name: pre-push-test-commit-msg
scenarios.rationale: Treatment correctly defines pre-push and commit-msg blocks using {1} for the commit message file per skill; baseline approximates with husky-style scripts and misses lefthook's YAML shape.
